title: Income Investing: 3 Dividend Aristocrats With Bright Outlooks
text: Many investors pivot to the Dividend Aristocrats when looking to generate an income stream. It's easy to understand why, as these companies have upped their payouts for a minimum of 25 consecutive years, fully reflecting their reliability.

title: Too many US adults are skipping wellness appointments that can help save their lives
text: 1 in 2 American adults admit to avoiding important health screenings  COLUMBUS, Ga. , June 28, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Americans don't seem to be on a path to living healthier, longer lives, according to a study released by Aflac Incorporated, a leading provider of supplemental health insurance in the U.S.1 The Wellness Matters survey, conducted among 2,001 employed adults in the U.S., examines attitudes, habits and opinions about health and preventive care.

title: Aflac (AFL) Upgraded to Buy: Here's What You Should Know

title: 5 Low-Beta Insurance Stocks to Beat Market Volatility

title: Insurer Aflac Swims On In Strong Rate Environment, But Remains Overbought
text: Aflac gets Hold rating due to strong capital, revenue diversification, and the macro environment - interest rates in its favor. It appears currently overbought and modestly overvalued, and dividend-income investors can get a much better yield than their peers in the insurance sector. The asset risk exposure to commercial & office space has already been factored in by the market but remains something to keep an eye on.

title: 3 Stocks that Make Sense in a Confusing Market
text: By exclusively reading the headline print, one might not recognize the pressing need for stable stock picks. For example, as CBS News recently pointed out, the bear market is finally over.

title: Nothing but net! Coach Dawn Staley warms children's hearts with award-winning My Special Aflac Duck®
text: Free-of-charge robotic companion helps comfort 5 pediatric cancer and sickle cell patients at UVA Children's COLUMBUS, Ga. , June 16, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Trailblazing University of Virginia basketball legend and South Carolina women's basketball head coach Dawn Staley teamed up with Aflac Incorporated, a leading provider of supplemental health insurance in the U.S., to deliver My Special Aflac Ducks , a free-of-charge resource created for children ages 3 and up with cancer and sickle cell disease, to patients at UVA Children's in Charlottesville, Virginia.

title: Aflac recognized as one of 50 most community-minded companies in U.S. for sixth consecutive year by Points of Light
text: COLUMBUS, Ga. , June 14, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Aflac Incorporated, a leading provider of supplemental health insurance in the U.S.,1 announced it has been named by Points of Light to The Civic 50 list for the sixth consecutive year, recognizing the company's commitment to corporate responsibility.

title: Coach Nick Saban, Ms. Terry Saban surprise children with award-winning My Special Aflac Duck®
text: Free-of-charge robotic companion helps comfort 18 pediatric cancer and sickle cell patients at Children's of Alabama COLUMBUS, Ga. , June 6, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Legendary Alabama football coach Nick Saban and Aflac Incorporated, a leading provider of health supplemental insurance in the U.S., expanded their starting lineup to include My Special Aflac Duck , a free-of-charge resource created for children ages 3 and up with cancer and sickle cell disease.
